visual_description: A man in a coat stands in a dim stone corridor, looking at a woman in a dark coat who reaches her hand toward him. The scene cuts to a close-up of two hands, one wearing a ring, reaching toward each other against a blurred background. The final shot shows a group of armored soldiers holding spears in a dark, foreboding setting.
